message:
test(robot): add cass diag --json golden (ibuuh.36 verification-matrix row 0)

ibuuh.36 scopes a stale-refresh verification matrix that preserves
'benchmark tables, logs, manifest snapshots, search-hit digests, and
crash-resume evidence'. The diag surface is the artifact-inventory
half of that evidence ledger: version, platform, paths, database /
index counts, and per-connector detection results.

Under an isolated empty HOME every diag field is deterministic (no
connectors detected, database absent, paths scrub to [TEST_HOME]),
so freezing it catches any silent drop or rename of inventory fields
that operators otherwise only discover when something breaks.

Fourth golden under the u9osp harness — builds cleanly on the
existing capture_robot_json helper + scrub_robot_json rules (no new
scrub rules needed: diag has no timestamps/durations/UUIDs that
weren't already covered).

VERIFICATION:
UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json → 4/4 pass.
3 consecutive stable re-runs → 4/4 each.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.36; bead stays
open since the full matrix (benchmark tables, crash harness, rollout
gates) is multi-day and depends on in-flight ibuuh.15 / ibuuh.17
harness work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,119 @@

+  "version": "0.3.6",
+  "platform": {

+    "arch": "x86_64"
